title: AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN ITEMS IN SECTION ONE, REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWO THOUSAND NINETY-THREE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2226 / 55 OG No. 35, 7306 (August 31, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2446, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN ITEMS IN SECTION ONE, REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWO THOUSAND NINETY-THREE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Items (

m

) and (

n

), for the Province of Leyte, subparagraph twenty-three, paragraph a, Title D, section one of Republic Act Numbered Two thousand ninety-three, is hereby amended to read as follows:

"(

m

) San Roque Waterworks, Macrohon P5,000.00

"(

n

) San Isidro Waterworks, Malitbog 20,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
